text.tspan: # Where do we find worlds like ours? 5,600+ confirmed exoplanets, one scatter.

svg.text: Agent active (claude) · driving exoplanets — type instructions here, or use “Fix with agent” on a failing cell

g.text: Plotted all 5,632 confirmed planets — radius vs orbital period, log x. The violet points are the
24 habitable-zone candidates; that band near 200–400 days is Kepler's sweet spot.
ircle the most Earth-like one and label it
bypass permissions on (shift+tab to cycle) · ← for agents
